environment_prompt: Underwater above a vibrant coral reef. Colorful tropical fish swimming around branching corals. Sunlight piercing turquoise water from above, creating shimmering caustic patterns on the reef. A sea turtle gliding in the mid-distance. Behind and below the viewer, the coral reef slopes downward into a deeper sandy seabed. A dark underwater cave opening is visible in the reef wall to the lower left. Schools of smaller silver fish drift in the open water beyond the reef edge.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, underwater diving view looking forward and slightly downward over the coral reef.

interactions.prompt: The view switches from first-person to third-person, pulling back to reveal a scuba diver in a black and yellow wetsuit with twin silver air tanks on the back from behind.
The view switches back to first-person, returning to the character's own eyes.
